hypothesis: If hypothetical metal lattices exhibiting strong interstitial electron localization are prioritized using a stack-ensembled ML model trained on prototype-derived features to predict low Ehull at high pressure, then DFT will validate them as thermodynamically stable metal superhydrides with high superconducting potential (large λ and Tc) because interstitial quasi-atom states enable 3D electronic connectivity and hydrogen-dominated Fermi-level states that enhance electron-phonon coupling.
